response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, along with expertise in cloud platforms and containerization. His recent role includes AI-agent infrastructure, aligning well with the job's requirement for modern stack proficiency. His background in scalable systems, testing frameworks, and security best practices further strengthens his fit for the role.
strengths: 10+ years of full-stack development experience across multiple languages and frameworks
Proven expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud-native technologies (AWS, Docker/Kubernetes)
Deep experience with testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) and AI agent development
concerns: Limited experience with Nest.js, a primary stack requirement, though strong in similar frameworks like Express.js
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL or MySQL, though MongoDB and SQL are listed as skills
Previous roles include less relevant domains (embedded systems, GIS) which may dilute focus from enterprise automation tooling

key_factors.factor: Full-stack experience with primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
AI agent and cloud-native (AWS, Docker/Kubernetes) experience
